chunks.text: Sophia Shao wins the 2022 IEEE TCCA Young Computer Architect Award - EECS at Berkeley Assistant Prof. Sophia Shao has won the IEEE Technical Committee on Computer Architecture (TCCA) Young Computer Architect Award, which recognizes outstanding research contributions by an individual in the field of Computer Architecture, and who received their Ph.D. within the last six years. Shao’s work focuses on specialized accelerators, heterogeneous architecture, and agile VLSI design methodology. The award was presented last week at the 49th edition of the International Symposium on Computer Architecture (ISCA ’22) in New York City, New York. Categories Faculty Honors Research View Open Faculty Positions
